calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2010 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-06-10 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compel Response To Discovery, Sanctions And Order For The Genuineness Of Documents And Truth Of Matters Asserted
Off Calendar Jun-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted.
1. Arrow Financial Services, LLC's Motion to compel response to discovery and order for the genuineness of documents and truth of matters asserted granted:
a. All objections are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
b. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendant shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's special interrogatories (set one) and request for production of documents (set one);
c. The matters set forth in plaintiff's request for admissions (set one) are deemed admitted.
2. Request for sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-31-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
